environmentId.description: Get environment ID from your instance URL: [environmentId].live.dynatrace.com

httpClientTimeout.description: The timeout for the HTTP client in seconds. Default is 30 seconds.

tlsAuthWithCACert.description: Needed for verifying self-signed TLS Certificates

secureValues.description: The API token for the Dynatrace API. This is required for Older api endpoints on Dynatrace like Metrics, Problems, Logs, etc.
The Platform token for the Dynatrace Platform API. This is required for Newer api endpoints on Dynatrace like Grail
TLS/SSL Certs are encrypted and stored in the Grafana database.
